title: Coast-to-Coast L&E Series: Your Top Questions Answered - June 2024
content:
## Coast-to-Coast L&E Series: Your Top Questions Answered - June 2024
Join us for a webinar presentation as the National Labour and Employment team answers the most commonly asked questions that we have heard from you recently. Speakers : Ben Aberant , Sarah Adler , Amélie Drouin , Sarah Hickey , Tim Lawson , Kimberly Lennon , Grace McDonell , Megan Pryor , Emilie Thibault Note: All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be forwarded a few days before the event. This program qualifies for up to 1.5 hours of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario. Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: This program contains up to 1.5 hours of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec . For questions about this seminar, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
12:00 p.m. – 1:30 p.m. (ET) 10:00 a.m. – 11:30 a.m. (MT) 9:00 a.m. – 10:30 a.m. (PT)
